info.title: Books App API
info.description: Backend API for Books App — books, reviews, discussions, challenges, user library, and swipe-based recommendations.

get.summary: Health check

post.summary: Log out (client must discard tokens; refresh token revocation handled client-side via Supabase)

get.summary: Swipe-deck feed (cursor-paginated, personalized by liked-book subjects for authed users)
List books (paginated, searchable, filterable by tag)
Get a single book by ID
Get recommended books similar to a given book (subject overlap)
List all available book subjects (genres)
List reviews for a book

post.summary: Submit a review for a book

get.summary: Counts of the authenticated user's books by reading status
Get the authenticated user's saved books

post.summary: Add a book to the authenticated user's library

patch.summary: Update reading status, progress, or current book flag

delete.summary: Remove a book from the authenticated user's library

get.summary: Get authenticated user's profile, reading stats, and preferences
Get notification and reading preferences

post.summary: Change password (email/password users only) — delegates to Supabase client-side

get.summary: Get authenticated user's earned badges
Get the user's current reading book (the one marked isCurrent)

post.summary: Register a push notification token for this device

get.summary: List discussion threads
Get a thread with its replies

patch.summary: Update a thread (only the creator may do this)

delete.summary: Soft-delete a thread (only the creator may do this)

post.summary: Post a reply to a thread

delete.summary: Soft-delete a reply (only the author may do this)

get.summary: Global leaderboard ranked by XP
List active reading challenges with user progress
Get challenge details by ID

patch.summary: Update a challenge (creator only, cosmetic fields)

get.summary: Get authenticated user's progress for a specific challenge
Get the leaderboard for a specific challenge (ranked by progress)

post.summary: Record a swipe on a book (left = pass, right = like)

get.summary: Get accepted friends list
Get incoming and outgoing pending requests

delete.summary: Remove a friend or cancel a pending request

tags.name: friends
tags.description: User-to-user friend requests and friendship management
